configurePresets.name: mac-qt6
configurePresets.description: Debug build using a Qt 6 macOS kit. Set environment variable QT_PREFIX to the kit prefix containing Qt6Config.cmake (for example $HOME/Qt/6.11.x/macos). For plain `cmake -S` without this preset, pass the same path via -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=... instead.

configurePresets.name: cpack-without-shipped-pdfium
configurePresets.description: Release + CPack like CI, with PDFDOCUMENTVIEW_PACKAGE_COMPONENT_SET=RUNTIME_WITHOUT_SHIPPED_PDFIUM (integrator supplies libpdfium). Requires QT_PREFIX or CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH to a Qt 6 kit (same as mac-qt6).
